description: Composition White printed kurta made of 100% cotton fabric, has short sleeves, a round neckline, buttoned chest placket and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only This kurta by diva is designed to accentuate your femininity, combining traditional prints with a modern silhouette. Look stylish in this ethnic kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats for an off-duty look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8"and chest 33"
